Get Started

Everyworld is not available to individuals from the US and other select countries.

Residents of the United States are ineligible to participate in Everyworld. In addition, residents of the following countries are also ineligible: Afghanistan, Australia, Belgium, Belize, Bolivia, Canada (province of Quebec), Cambodia, Chad, China, Columbia, Cuba, Iran, Iraq, Lebanon, Libya, Myanmar, North Korea, Pakistan, Russia, Singapore, Somalia, Sudan, Syria, Tanzania, Thailand, Turkey and where otherwise prohibited by law. If you are a resident of one of these countries, do NOT enter a Drawing, since the Drawings are NOT intended for you.

You must be 18 years or older (20 years or older in Japan) to participate in Everyworld.

Residents of these countries or individuals physically located in these countries are prohibited from collecting any payouts. For the avoidance of doubt, use of the Services is void where prohibited by law.

Everyworld reserves the right, in its sole discretion, to condition the awarding/distribution of $EVERY upon the passing of its Know Your Customer (“KYC”) process.
